message.content:
Read the following files from the prototype project at `C:\Users\charl\OneDrive\Área de Trabalho\WA\Easy prototipo` and return their FULL contents:

1. `app/globals.css` (main CSS file with CSS variables/tokens)
2. `tailwind.config.ts` or `tailwind.config.js`
3. `components.json` (shadcn config)
4. Any favicon/icon files listed in `app/layout.tsx` or `app/layout.js` - just the relevant metadata lines

Search for files matching these patterns:
- `app/globals.css`
- `tailwind.config.*`
- `components.json`
- `app/layout.tsx`

Return the complete content of each file found.

content.text: I'll search for and read these files from the prototype project.

content.text: Now let me read these files:

content.content:
1→import type React from "react"
     2→import type { Metadata } from "next"
     3→import { Inter } from "next/font/google"
     4→import { Analytics } from "@vercel/analytics/next"
     5→import { AuthProvider } from "@/contexts/auth-context"
     6→import { CallProvider } from "@/contexts/call-context"
     7→import { SubscriptionProvider } from "@/contexts/subscription-context"
     8→import { SalonDataProvider } from "@/contexts/salon-data-context"
     9→import { TourProvider } from "@/contexts/tour-context"
    10→import { ConfigStatusProvider } from "@/contexts/config-status-context"
    11→import { SidebarProvider } from "@/contexts/sidebar-context"
    12→import { SubscriptionModal } from "@/components/salon/subscription-modal"
    13→import { TourOverlay } from "@/components/ui/tour-overlay"
    14→import { Toaster } from "@/components/ui/toaster"
    15→import { SalonOnboardingModals } from "@/components/salon/salon-onboarding-modals"
    16→import { GlobalCallNotifications } from "@/components/layout/global-call-notifications"
    17→import "./globals.css"
    18→
    19→const _inter = Inter({ subsets: ["latin"] })
    20→
    21→export const metadata: Metadata = {
    22→  title: "Easy Salon - Sistema de Agendamentos",
    23→  description: "Sistema de gerenciamento de agendamentos para salões",
    24→  icons: {
    25→    icon: "/favicon.png",
    26→  },
    27→    generator: 'v0.app'
    28→}
    29→
    30→export default function RootLayout({
    31→  children,
    32→}: Readonly<{
    33→  children: React.ReactNode
    34→}>) {
    35→  return (
    36→    <html lang="pt-BR">
    37→      <body className={`font-sans antialiased`}>
    38→        <AuthProvider>
    39→          <CallProvider>
    40→            <SubscriptionProvider>
    41→              <SalonDataProvider>
    42→                <TourProvider>
    43→                  <ConfigStatusProvider>
    44→                    <SidebarProvider>
    45→                      {children}
    46→                      <GlobalCallNotifications />
    47→                      <SubscriptionModal />
    48→                      <TourOverlay />
    49→                      <SalonOnboardingModals />
    50→                      <Toaster />
    51→                    </SidebarProvider>
    52→                  </ConfigStatusProvider>
    53→                </TourProvider>
    54→              </SalonDataProvider>
    55→            </SubscriptionProvider>
    56→          </CallProvider>
    57→        </AuthProvider>
    58→        <Analytics />
    59→      </body>
    60→    </html>
    61→  )
    62→}
    63→
